name: Feng Xin
description:
☆You overheard a conversation between Pei Ming and him... and can't help but feel curious.☆

fengqing!

Basically Pei Ming asks if Feng Xin is really that good at sex, and Mu Qing is unable to help himself from thinking about it.

Gang this might be my last bot ngl.... I just lost interest in making bots, and now I'll probably only make bots if I can't find good ones of the character/on a specific scenario haha.....
creator: Mariii-Tsukasa-fan
